history.en: A modern designer crossbreed developed in the United States by crossing a Cavalier King Charles Spaniel with Pomeranian to create a small companion dog combining the gentle nature of the Cavalier with the lively, fluffy appearance of the Pomeranian. Gained popularity in the late 20th and early 21st centuries
history.zh: 一种现代设计师杂交犬，在美国通过将卡瓦利尔国王查理士猎犬与博美犬杂交培育而成，旨在创造一种结合卡瓦利尔温柔天性和博美活泼蓬松外观的小型伴侣犬。在20世纪末和21世纪初流行起来。

overview.en: The Cavapom is a delightful designer crossbreed, blending the gentle, affectionate nature of the Cavalier King Charles Spaniel with the lively, fluffy charm of the Pomeranian. This small companion dog is known for being friendly, outgoing, and intelligent, making it an excellent family pet. They are alert and playful, often retaining a puppy-like energy well into adulthood. With a soft, medium-length coat that can be wavy or straight, the Cavapom typically weighs between 5 to 12 pounds and stands 9 to 12 inches tall. Their expressive eyes and perky ears give them an endearing appearance. This breed thrives on human companionship and may suffer from separation anxiety if left alone for long periods. They are generally good with children and other pets, especially when socialized early. Overall, the Cavapom is a loving, adaptable dog that brings joy and warmth to any home.
overview.zh: 卡瓦波姆犬是一种令人愉悦的设计师混种犬，融合了卡瓦利尔国王查尔斯猎犬温柔、亲和的性格与博美犬活泼、蓬松的魅力。这种小型伴侣犬以友好、外向和聪明著称，是优秀的家庭宠物。它们机警且爱玩，通常将幼犬般的活力保持到成年。毛发柔软、中等长度，可能呈波浪状或直发，体重通常在5到12磅之间，身高9到12英寸。它们富有表情的眼睛和竖起的耳朵使其外表惹人喜爱。这个品种非常依赖人类陪伴，长时间独处可能会产生分离焦虑。如果从小进行社会化训练，它们通常对孩子和其他宠物友好。总的来说，卡瓦波姆犬是一只充满爱心、适应性强的狗，能为任何家庭带来欢乐和温暖。

care.en: Daily care for a Cavapom includes regular grooming to prevent mats, as their coat can be prone to tangles. Brush at least 3-4 times a week, and consider professional grooming every 6-8 weeks. Baths should be given monthly or as needed. Exercise needs are moderate: a daily 20-30 minute walk plus playtime keeps them happy. They enjoy interactive toys and short games of fetch. Dental hygiene is crucial—brush teeth 2-3 times a week to prevent dental disease. Nail trimming every 3-4 weeks and regular ear checks for wax buildup are also important. Veterinary visits should be scheduled annually for check-ups and vaccinations. Cavapoms are prone to luxating patella, hip dysplasia, and eye issues, so monitor for limping or eye discharge. Keep their weight in check to avoid joint stress. Grooming also provides bonding time, so make it a positive experience with treats and praise.
care.zh: 卡瓦波姆犬的日常护理包括定期梳理毛发以防止打结，因为它们的毛发容易缠结。每周至少梳理3-4次，并考虑每6-8周进行一次专业美容。每月或根据需要洗澡。运动需求适中：每天20-30分钟的散步加上玩耍时间就能让它们快乐。它们喜欢互动玩具和短时间的接球游戏。牙齿卫生至关重要——每周刷牙2-3次以预防牙病。每3-4周修剪指甲，并定期检查耳朵是否有耳垢堆积。每年应安排兽医检查并接种疫苗。卡瓦波姆犬易患髌骨脱位、髋关节发育不良和眼部问题，因此要留意跛行或眼部分泌物。控制体重以避免关节压力。美容也是增进感情的时间，用零食和赞美让它成为积极的体验。

training.en: Training a Cavapom is generally easy due to their intelligence and eagerness to please. Use positive reinforcement methods like treats, praise, and play. They respond well to clicker training. Keep sessions short (5-10 minutes) and fun to maintain their attention. Start with basic commands like sit, stay, come, and down. Socialization is key: expose them to various people, dogs, and environments from puppyhood to prevent shyness or fearfulness. Crate training can help with housebreaking and provide a safe space. They may have a stubborn streak inherited from the Pomeranian side, so patience and consistency are important. Avoid harsh corrections as they can be sensitive. Advanced training like tricks or agility can be enjoyable for this active breed. House training requires a consistent schedule—take them out frequently, especially after meals and naps. Reward successes immediately. If you encounter issues, consider enrolling in a puppy class for guided socialization.
training.zh: 训练卡瓦波姆犬通常很容易，因为它们聪明且渴望取悦。使用正面强化方法，如零食、赞美和玩耍。它们对响片训练反应良好。保持训练时间短（5-10分钟）且有趣，以维持它们的注意力。从基本命令开始，如坐下、停留、过来和趴下。社会化是关键：从幼犬时期就让它们接触不同的人、狗和环境，以防止害羞或恐惧。笼内训练有助于家庭训练并提供安全空间。它们可能带有博美犬遗传的固执一面，所以耐心和一致性很重要。避免严厉的纠正，因为它们可能敏感。对于这种活跃的品种，高级训练如技巧或敏捷性训练可以很有趣。家庭训练需要一致的时间表——经常带它们出去，尤其是饭后和小睡后。立即奖励成功。如果遇到问题，考虑参加幼犬班进行指导性社会化。

diet.en: Feed your Cavapom a high-quality, balanced diet appropriate for small breeds. Choose a formula with real meat as the first ingredient, and avoid fillers like corn or soy. Divide daily food into two or three meals to prevent hypoglycemia, common in small breeds. Portion control is vital to prevent obesity—typically 1/4 to 1/2 cup of dry food per day, adjusted for activity level. Treats should not exceed 10% of daily calories. Fresh water must always be available. Some Cavapoms may have food allergies, so monitor for itching or digestive issues. Consider foods with omega-3 fatty acids for coat health. Puppies need food formulated for growth; transition to adult food around 12 months. Senior dogs may require joint-supporting supplements like glucosamine. Avoid feeding table scraps, especially toxic foods like chocolate, grapes, onions, and xylitol. Consult your vet for specific dietary needs, especially if your dog has health conditions.
diet.zh: 给卡瓦波姆犬喂食适合小型犬的高质量均衡饮食。选择以真实肉类为首要成分的配方，避免玉米或大豆等填充物。将每日食物分成两到三餐，以防止低血糖，这在小型犬中常见。控制份量至关重要，以防止肥胖——通常每天1/4到1/2杯干粮，根据活动水平调整。零食不应超过每日卡路里的10%。必须始终提供新鲜水。一些卡瓦波姆犬可能有食物过敏，因此要留意瘙痒或消化问题。考虑含有欧米伽-3脂肪酸的食物以促进毛发健康。幼犬需要适合生长的食物；大约12个月时过渡到成犬粮。老年犬可能需要关节支持补充剂，如葡萄糖胺。避免喂食剩饭，特别是有毒食物如巧克力、葡萄、洋葱和木糖醇。咨询兽医以获取特定饮食需求，特别是在您的狗有健康问题时。

livingTips.en: Cavapoms are highly adaptable and thrive in apartments or houses with yards, as long as they get daily exercise. They are indoor dogs and should not be left outside unattended. Their small size makes them ideal for city living. They are generally good with children, but supervision is needed with very young kids to prevent accidental injury due to their small size. Early socialization helps them get along with other dogs and cats. They can be vocal, so training to curb excessive barking is advisable. Provide a comfortable bed, toys, and a safe space. They do not tolerate extreme heat or cold well due to their coat; keep them in temperature-controlled environments. Grooming needs can be managed at home or by a professional. Cavapoms are prone to separation anxiety, so they do best in homes where someone is present most of the day. If left alone, provide puzzle toys or consider a pet sitter. Overall, they are wonderful companions for singles, couples, and families alike.
livingTips.zh: 卡瓦波姆犬适应性强，只要每天有运动，就能在公寓或带院子的房子里茁壮成长。它们是室内犬，不应无人看管留在室外。体型小巧使它们非常适合城市生活。它们通常对孩子友好，但由于体型小，与幼儿互动时需要监督以防止意外伤害。早期社会化有助于它们与其他狗和猫相处。它们可能爱叫，因此训练控制过度吠叫是可取的。提供舒适的床、玩具和安全空间。由于毛发原因，它们不耐极端高温或低温；将它们置于温度可控的环境中。美容需求可以在家或由专业人员处理。卡瓦波姆犬容易患分离焦虑，因此最适合有人大部分时间在家的家庭。如果单独留下，提供益智玩具或考虑宠物保姆。总的来说，它们是单身人士、夫妇和家庭的绝佳伴侣。
